---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for the Pura HomeKit Bridge
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence describing the feature. -->



## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? What use case drives it?
     e.g. "I can't control individual bay slots from HomeKit because..." -->



## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you'd like it to work. Be as specific as you can —
     entity types, service calls, UI behaviour, etc. -->



## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any other approaches you've thought about or tried. -->



## Additional Context
<!-- Mockups, links to similar integrations, HA developer docs, or anything
     else that would help evaluate or implement this feature. -->



## ESPHome / Local-Control Relevance
<!-- If this feature relates to the planned ESPHome migration path
     (replacing the Pura cloud API with a local device connection),
     describe how it fits. -->
